title: Kofi's Wiggly Tooth
synopsis: Kofi discovers his first loose tooth and embarks on a hilarious adventure with his best friend Mia to help it fall out, leading to funny mishaps and the joy of friendship.

pages.text: Kofi was eating his favorite crunchy apple at lunch when something felt very strange. His front tooth felt... wiggly! He pushed it gently with his tongue. Wiggle, wiggle, wiggle!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes sits at a colorful lunch table, eyes comically wide with surprise, mouth open showing a slightly crooked tooth, holding a bright red apple with exaggerated cartoon bite marks
illustration.alt: Kofi discovering his loose tooth while eating an apple

pages.text: "Mia! Mia!" Kofi called to his best friend across the playground. "My tooth is doing a funny dance!" He wiggled it with his finger to show her. The tooth moved back and forth like a tiny door.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes pointing excitedly at his mouth while running toward his friend Mia, his body stretched in an exaggerated cartoon sprint with candy bright colors all around the playground
illustration.alt: Kofi excitedly running to tell his friend about his loose tooth

pages.text: Mia's eyes grew as big as saucers. "Wow! Your first loose tooth! My big sister says the Tooth Fairy comes when it falls out. We need to help it come out right away!"

illustration.description: Mia with huge cartoon eyes looking amazed while Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes grins widely showing his wiggly tooth, both characters drawn in bouncy dynamic poses with oversized expressions
illustration.alt: Mia looking amazed at Kofi's loose tooth

pages.text: "I have the BEST idea!" said Mia. "Let's tie a string to your tooth and tie the other end to a door. Then we'll slam it shut!" Kofi gulped. That sounded a little scary, but also exciting!

illustration.description: Mia gesturing wildly with exaggerated enthusiasm while Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes looks worried with comically large sweat drops, rubber hose animation style with bouncy poses
illustration.alt: Mia explaining her door-slamming plan to nervous Kofi

pages.text: They found some yarn in the art room. Mia carefully tied one end to Kofi's wiggly tooth. The other end went to the classroom door handle. "Ready?" asked Mia. "Um... maybe?" squeaked Kofi.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes connected to a door by colorful yarn, looking nervously cross-eyed at the string while Mia prepares to slam the door, drawn in slapstick energy style
illustration.alt: Kofi tied to the door with yarn, looking nervous

pages.text: SLAM! The door shut hard! But the string broke and Kofi tumbled backward in a silly somersault. His tooth was still wiggling in his mouth! "Oops!" giggled Mia. "Maybe we need Plan B!"

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes doing an exaggerated cartoon tumble with his arms and legs stretched in rubber hose animation style, broken yarn pieces flying everywhere with comedic poses and candy bright colors
illustration.alt: Kofi tumbling after the string breaks

pages.text: "I know!" said Mia. "Let's try the apple trick! Bite into this really hard!" She handed Kofi the biggest, crunchiest apple from the lunch room. Kofi opened his mouth super wide.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes opening his mouth impossibly wide in exaggerated cartoon style while Mia holds an enormous bright red apple, both drawn with oversized expressions and bouncy dynamic energy
illustration.alt: Kofi opening his mouth wide to bite a large apple

pages.text: CRUNCH! Kofi bit the apple as hard as he could. But instead of his tooth coming out, he got apple pieces all over his face! "Pfft! Pfft!" he sputtered, spitting out apple bits. The tooth wiggled even more now!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes covered in apple pieces with an exaggerated messy face, mouth open spitting cartoon apple bits while his tooth wiggles dramatically, drawn in slapstick energy style
illustration.alt: Kofi spitting out apple pieces with a messier loose tooth

pages.text: Mia started laughing so hard at Kofi's apple-covered face that she snorted! Her funny snort made Kofi laugh too. He laughed and laughed and laughed until his belly hurt from all the giggling.

illustration.description: Both friends in comedic poses with Mia snorting with laughter and Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes laughing hysterically with his whole body shaking, drawn with squash and stretch animation and oversized expressions
illustration.alt: Mia and Kofi laughing hysterically together

pages.text: And then... POP! Out came the tooth! It had fallen out while he was laughing! "It worked!" shouted Kofi, holding up his tiny white tooth. "The best plan was just having fun with my best friend!"

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes jumping triumphantly while holding a tiny white tooth high in the air, gap-toothed smile beaming, drawn in bouncy dynamic style with candy bright celebration colors all around
illustration.alt: Kofi celebrating with his fallen tooth in hand

pages.text: That night, Kofi put his tooth under his pillow. The next morning, he found a shiny coin and a note: "Thank you for the tooth! P.S. - Laughter is the best tooth-loosener of all! Love, The Tooth Fairy."

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes in pajamas holding a sparkly coin and fairy note with wonder-filled oversized expressions, his bedroom drawn in exaggerated cartoon style with magical glittery effects
illustration.alt: Kofi finding the Tooth Fairy's coin and note

metadata.illustrationStyle: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel

questions.question: What was Kofi eating when he discovered his loose tooth?
questions.explanation: Kofi was eating his favorite crunchy apple at lunch when he felt his tooth wiggle.

questions.question: Who did Kofi tell about his loose tooth first?
questions.explanation: Kofi called to his best friend Mia across the playground to tell her about his wiggly tooth.

questions.question: What was Mia's first plan to get the tooth out?
choices: tie string to the tooth and a door
questions.explanation: Mia's first idea was to tie a string to the tooth and the other end to a door, then slam it shut.

questions.question: How did Kofi's tooth finally fall out?
questions.explanation: The tooth popped out while Kofi was laughing hysterically with his friend Mia.

questions.question: What did the Tooth Fairy leave for Kofi?
questions.explanation: The Tooth Fairy left Kofi a shiny coin and a note saying laughter is the best tooth-loosener.
